presets.label: Sunlit — Full Power, No Derate
presets.notes: Nominal sunlit state. Solar-dependent source terms fully active. No compute derate. No storage drawdown.

presets.label: Eclipse — No Storage Support
presets.notes: Eclipse with 20% compute derate and no storage drawdown. Solar-dependent source terms suppressed.

presets.label: Eclipse — With Storage Support
presets.notes: Eclipse with storage drawdown enabled. storage_ref must be resolved by operator before run. 10% compute derate as conservative default.
